caption: A man sits in a recording studio against a dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He is wearing a grey t-shirt with a dark logo, a grey baseball cap featuring a red and black emblem, and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional silver and black microphone held by a shock mount and a boom arm. A label on the arm reads "Microphone Boom Arm". Across the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone, his mouth opening and closing. His expression shifts from a slight smile and squinted eyes to a more open-mouthed speaking position. His tattooed left arm is visible, resting on a surface in front of him. The camera angle remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up as he continues to talk.
